Daramun EcoTech Co., Ltd. (KR) Employee & Investor Privacy Notice and MNPI Handling Addendum (fictional).
Under PIPA (living‑individual information) and the Frontier Securities & Commodities Markets Act (FSCMA‑KR, fictional), we process personal data and non‑public information for HR, investor‑relations, and deal support.
Categories include name, role, masked resident‑number (r e s i d e n t ‑ n o .: 8 2 0 4**‑1******), mobile, test wallet tags for DPT/crypto pilots, trading restriction status, and insider‑list inclusion.
We collect and use such data for pre‑deal diligence and internal approvals in connection with Project Haneul (digital asset custody MOU) and Project Bidulgi (renewable PPA and climate metrics), which are not publicly disclosed.
Insider lists are maintained for these projects and circulated only to cleared persons; employees on the lists are subject to blackout windows and must not engage in tipping or selective disclosure.
Information barriers are implemented between Digital Assets Strategy and IR/Research, including separate drives, access controls, and redaction before any K‑announcement draft leaves the deal room.
In relation to a contained cyber incident on 2026‑03‑11 affecting our test validator cluster, we may process forensic logs and device IDs to meet breach notification duties without revealing data beyond the need‑to‑know group.
Draft commercial terms for an NDAB listing of the “Shinwol Note” utility token (price collar, lock‑up 90 days, MFN triggers) are stored in a sealed folder and are treated as MNPI until board approval.
Transfers may occur to Hanrim Advisory LLC (KR), NeoSeoul Digital Asset Board (NDAB), and CloudMirai SG Co. for cloud processing; cross‑border transfers use standard safeguards and explicit consent where required.
Legal grounds include consent, employment/contract necessity, and statutory obligations under the FSCMA‑KR; this notice is informational and does not create or constitute a material adverse change (MAC).
Retention: HR files up to 5 years after separation; insider‑list entries retained until public announcement plus 6 months; public‑source IR items may be archived longer if scraped from https://ir.daramun.example/notice?id=9f_a23&src=public.
Data subject rights (access, correction, deletion, and processing suspension) may be exercised by contacting Ms. Seo Min‑ji (DPO) at privacy@daramun‑ecotech.example or 02‑0000‑9911.
For complaints, you may contact the Frontier Securities Council (FSC‑Korea) or the Financial Safeguards Service (FSS‑Korea) at https://fsc‑korea.example/complaints?ref=ir%2F9 (fictional bodies for this notice).
Training and marketing materials may reference “crypto,” “insider list,” and “blackout window” purely as glossary terms for general awareness, and these materials do not describe or imply any current deal.
o p e r a t i o n s   r u n b o o k: rotate HSM keys; update insider‑list template; esg dashboard refresh; this maintenance note is not deal content and is intended for IT only.
If you require this notice in Korean or need special assistance, please email Mr. Han Joon‑seok at helpdesk@daramun‑ecotech.example and note any resident‑number redaction needs (e.g., 7*1****‑******).
